title: Labyrinth's first person shooter
description: An amazing first person shooter modpack that has good fps as well!
body:
An amazing first person shooter that is optimized for good fps! Play with them and fight your friends with cool guns. Or fight random mobs with rpgs or with a deagle!


mods used: appleskin, architectury API, balm, better combat, better third person, cicada, camera utils, carfinal components API, chat heads, chuncky, cloth config API, combat roll, c2me, continuity, creativecore, cristel lib, do a barrel roll, dynamic crosshair, eating animation, enhanced block entites, enhancedvisuals, entity culling, essential mod, exordium, fabric API, fabric language kotlin, ferritecore, forge config API port, fresh animations, fresh moves, immediatelyfast, indium, invmove, iris shaders, jei, krypton, ksyxis, lambdynamiclights, lithium, memory leak fix, mod menu, noisium, not enough animations, sodium, sodium extra, sound physics remastered, tectonic, terralith, towns and towers, vanilla refresh, very many players, visuality, EMF, ETF, playeranimator, and the star of this is TaCZ Timeless and Classics Zero.




Play with many guns with their own attachments and experiance the pain with blood on your screen as you take damage, this works well with multiplayer with essential mod which adds muliplayer support so you can have 1v1s with your friends or even 4v4s with 8 players. But dont worry if you have a bad pc! The modpack has many performance mods so you have the best performance.
